basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Veterinarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has released the official notification for the recruitment of Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) on a contractual basis. A total of 1 vacancy is available for qualified candidates holding a BVSc & AH degree along with valid registration from the State Veterinary Council or Veterinary Council of India and relevant work experience. Interested and eligible candidates can submit their applications through the online mode on or before 17 July 2026. Candidates can check the detailed eligibility criteria, age limit, salary, selection process, and

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in veterinary science & animal Husbandry (BVSc &AH) with 2 years of experience, Valid registration issued by state veterinary council/ Veterinary Council of India, Master of Veterinary Science (M.V.Sc.) in relevant subjects (desirable), PhD in relevant subjects (desirable)
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in veterinary science & animal Husbandry (BVSc &AH) as listed in the 1st & 2nd Schedule of the Indian Veterinary Council Act, 1984 with 2 years of experience. Must have a valid registration issued by state veterinary council/ Veterinary Council of India. Desirable: Master of Veterinary Science (M.V.Sc.) in Veterinary Medicine or Veterinary Microbiology or Veterinary Pathology or Veterinary Pharmacology and Toxicology with a valid registration. PhD candidates preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Veterinarian Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Indore Veterinarian Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Veterinarian Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in veterinary science & animal Husbandry (BVSc &AH) as listed in the 1st & 2nd Schedule of the Indian Veterinary Council Act, 1984 with 2 years of experience. Must have a valid registration issued by state veterinary council/ Veterinary Council of India. Desirable: Master of Veterinary Science (M.V.Sc.) in Veterinary Medicine or Veterinary Microbiology or Veterinary Pathology or Veterinary Pharmacology and Toxicology with a valid registration. PhD candidates preferred.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Veterinarian Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Veterinarian Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Veterinarian Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted online before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Veterinarian post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in veterinary science & animal Husbandry (BVSc &AH) with 2 years of experience and a valid registration from a state veterinary council or the Veterinary Council of India.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is between Rs. 400 to Rs. 500 per hour for the Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) role.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) position at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official IIT Indore website.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable qualifications for the Veterinarian post?
faq.answer: A Master of Veterinary Science (M.V.Sc.) in relevant subjects or a PhD in relevant subjects is considered desirable for this position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Veterinarian (Visiting Consultant) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Certificate Verification followed by an Interview/Interaction with the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
